seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Makeup Bag with Wrist Strap | OEM Cosmetic Pouch Manufacturer
description:
Designed for people who value convenience and simplicity, this neoprene makeup bag features a practical wrist strap that allows easy carrying wherever you go. The clean silhouette and lightweight construction make it an excellent companion for everyday routines, travel, gym visits, and business trips.

Manufactured from premium neoprene, the bag offers a soft-touch finish with excellent flexibility, helping protect cosmetics and personal items from minor impacts while remaining comfortable to carry.

Its minimal appearance also provides an ideal surface for customized branding, making it a popular choice for cosmetic companies, promotional campaigns, retail brands, and OEM projects.
seoDescription: Source premium neoprene makeup bags with wrist straps directly from Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd. We offer OEM & ODM cosmetic pouches with custom logos, colors, sizes, and private label manufacturing for beauty brands worldwide.
